claim: No Stable, release, conformance, or manual assistive-technology claim is made by this source contract.
summary: A controlled or uncontrolled single/multiple pressed-button collection with roving focus.
semantics: Exactly one enabled item is the tab stop during SSR and every render; Home, End, orientation arrows, RTL spatial arrows, wrapping, and disabled skipping move it.
Arrow movement never changes selection; native activation does.
Single selection cannot become empty unless allowEmpty is explicit.
renderSelectionSummary is an optional live output and no summary UI or accessibility node exists when it is omitted.

preferences.forcedColors: System colors preserve boundaries, state, and focus.
preferences.reducedMotion: Feedback remains understandable when transitions and rotation are removed.
preferences.rtl: Logical properties and the documented spatial keyboard model follow direction.

responsive.overflowPolicy: Wrap, reflow, or expose native scrolling without clipping controls or focus indicators.
